forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 65. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog after 11pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 48, with temperatures rising to around 55 overnight. West wind 7 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

weather_report:
This afternoon in Boston, the sky wears a soft veil of grayish clouds, casting a muted light over the city, akin to a gentle embrace. The air is alive with a mild breeze stirring from the southwest, carrying the promise of a comfortable day ahead with temperatures flirting around the mid-sixties. While the clouds may shield the sun at times, the overall atmosphere remains pleasant, urging one to venture outdoors, where the scent of spring lingers. As twilight approaches, expect the soft emergence of patchy fog after 11 PM, as the temperature tenderly dips to the low forties, eventually nudging towards the mid-fifties overnight. 

In light of these conditions, dressing in layers will serve you well. A light jacket paired with a long-sleeved shirt could strike the perfect balance against the coolness of the evening. A stroll along the Esplanade or perhaps a quiet moment at one of the many parks would complement this tranquil setting. Consider diving into a book beneath the shady branches, or enjoying a warm beverage from a local café, as the gentle rhythms of the day fade into the calm of night.
